title: Gin’s Loyalty Breaks Under Krieg’s Cruelty
scene: On pages 17–20, the Baratie conflict focuses on Luffy, Sanji, Don Krieg, Gin, Zeff. Don Krieg prepares poison gas, forcing enemies and allies alike to face the cruelty of his warfare.

dialogue.speaker: Gin
dialogue.text: That's what he gets for thinking he's eternally indebted just for receiving some grub.

dialogue.speaker: Don Krieg
dialogue.text: Well... idiots will never understand until they die...

dialogue.speaker: Gin
dialogue.text: It seems you've chosen the wrong man to follow!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: What!? Stormy Seas alert!? Doesn't matter!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Full Speed Ahead, USOPP gallery Pirates!

summary: This part keeps the Baratie battle centered on willpower, debt, hunger, and pride. The dialogue shows who still stands firm after Krieg’s violence and who is ready to break away from the restaurant’s old life.
